tests.description: Loop with LLM calls generating items then fork with interrupts per batch — tests deep nesting of LLM, tool, fork, and interrupt

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: The output should be an array of 4 strings. Each string should start with 'confirmed:' and contain items from two categories (alpha and beta), each with two items (like alpha-1, alpha-2, beta-1, beta-2). The exact format may vary but there should be 4 confirmed items covering both categories.
